games.name: Bidstorm
games.description: Everyone holds the same thirteen cards — outbid your rivals for each prize, and never spend more than you had to.

games.name: Lumenlock
games.description: Flip mirrors to bend a beam through a prism, splitting white light into a rainbow, and lock every crystal in its own colour.

games.name: Nightwire
games.description: Hidden-role deduction where the clues are numbers: probe a seat to learn how many Ghosts sit in that window, and remember the Ghosts choose what they publish.

games.name: Gravity Golf
games.description: Slingshot your ball through a field of planets and bend it around gravity into the hole.

games.name: Snake Royale
games.description: Classic snake in a shared arena — eat, grow and cut your rivals off; last snake slithering wins.

games.name: Rhythm Relay
games.description: Relay the beat down two lanes, tap in time to keep a shared combo alive, and take a lane each with a friend.

games.name: Hexbloom
games.description: Pick a colour to bloom your blob across the honeycomb and claim more tiles than your rivals.

games.name: Cipher Clash
games.description: Trace words on a shared letter grid and race to claim them before your rival does.
